title: AUKG-231 Mature Lesbians: More! Kazuko Iori and Yukari Seno - Kazuko An Kano
overview: A tangled meat daruma! The maniac project is back! Due to popular demand, the main cast of "Imaki Kazuko" and "Seno Yukari" are back for the second series! This time, the story of how the two became one and only partners is explored in more detail, making it even more interesting! This time too... it's caramelized (lol)
